stemHtml: Complete: Distress and urgency messages shall normally remain on the current air-ground frequency until _____.

options.a: SAR services assume all communications on 121.5 MHz.
options.b: Company dispatch is ready to manage the situation on their frequency.
options.c: Better assistance can be provided by transferring that traffic to another frequency.
options.d: The crew is ready to switch to 243.0 MHz.
